title: DESIGN.md Aesthetic Governor addendum

features.name: DESIGN.md Aesthetic Governor
features.summary: Forces UI/frontend coding through Gemini/Stitch configuration, DESIGN.md read proof, aesthetic reference selection, token discipline, and design drift verification.
features.user_value: Codex cannot silently improvise visual language before UI edits; it must verify design-service configuration, read the project design source, and produce a reusable compliance trail.

features.name: DESIGN.md Codex hook guard
features.summary: Adds UserPromptSubmit and PreToolUse hooks that remind on UI prompts and block common UI edit paths until design-service configuration and read-proof exist.
features.user_value: UI changes are enforced by deterministic hooks in addition to skill instructions.

manual_enablement: Ensure the governed project has Gemini/Stitch configuration from shell environment variables or project-root .env-design.
Use DESIGN_BASIC_MODE=1 when the user intentionally chooses local-only basic mode for frontend work.
Ensure the governed project has a root DESIGN.md.
Ensure Codex hooks are enabled in an active config layer: [features] codex_hooks = true.
Copy or merge templates/.codex/hooks.json and templates/.codex/hooks/design_md_codex_hook.py into the governed project if they are not already present.
For UI work, invoke $design-md-aesthetic-governor or rely on the skill description trigger.
